requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter Safety — IEC 62109 Baseline and Possible UL 1741 / NEMA Project Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器安全——IEC 62109基线及可能的UL 1741 / NEMA项目要求
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器安全——IEC 62109基線及可能的UL 1741 / NEMA項目要求

summary.en: PV inverter safety evidence for Trinidad and Tobago should use IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 as the international baseline for power converters in photovoltaic systems. Because Trinidad and Tobago is a 60 Hz, US-heritage NEMA market, project owners, T&TEC reviewers, or industrial customers may also request UL 1741 listing or test evidence, particularly where interconnection and safety certification are reviewed together. The safety file should identify the exact inverter model or family, AC voltage configuration, 60 Hz operating profile, enclosure rating, environmental category, overvoltage category, protective earthing, isolation design, DC input ratings, rapid shutdown or external disconnect assumptions where applicable, and tropical corrosion or humidity suitability for Caribbean deployment.
summary.zh: 特立尼达和多巴哥光伏逆变器安全证据应以IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2作为光伏系统功率变换器的国际基线。由于特立尼达和多巴哥为60 Hz、具有美国体系渊源的NEMA市场，项目业主、T&TEC审查方或工业客户也可能要求UL 1741列名或测试证据，尤其是在并网和安全认证一并审查时。安全文件应标明具体逆变器型号或系列、交流电压配置、60 Hz运行配置、外壳等级、环境类别、过电压类别、保护接地、隔离设计、直流输入额定值、适用时的快速关断或外部隔离开关假设，以及适用于加勒比部署的热带腐蚀或湿度适应性。
summary.zht: 千里達及托巴哥光伏逆變器安全證據應以IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2作為光伏系統功率轉換器的國際基線。由於千里達及托巴哥為60 Hz、具有美國體系淵源的NEMA市場，項目業主、T&TEC審查方或工業客戶也可能要求UL 1741列名或測試證據，尤其是在併網和安全認證一併審查時。安全文件應標明具體逆變器型號或系列、交流電壓配置、60 Hz運行配置、外殼等級、環境類別、過電壓類別、保護接地、隔離設計、直流輸入額定值、適用時的快速關斷或外部隔離開關假設，以及適用於加勒比部署的熱帶腐蝕或濕度適應性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
UL 1741 — Inverters, Converters, Controllers and Interconnection System Equipment for Use With Distributed Energy Resources (may be requested for NEMA/US-heritage projects)
TTBS (Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards) — national standards and conformity-assessment reference point
T&TEC project requirements and local electrical engineering approval for grid-tied installations

summary.en: China's common PV inverter safety evidence includes GB/T 37408-2021 and voluntary CQC or CGC certificates issued for China domestic requirements. These documents may include safety and marking elements, but they are not harmonised proof of IEC 62109-1/-2 compliance and do not establish UL 1741 listing. Chinese certificates also may not cover 60 Hz operation, NEMA hardware interfaces, tropical environmental assumptions, or project-specific T&TEC and TTBS documentation needs.
summary.zh: 中国常见光伏逆变器安全证据包括GB/T 37408-2021以及面向中国国内要求的CQC或CGC自愿性证书。这些文件可能包含安全和标识要素，但并非IEC 62109-1/-2合规的协调证明，也不能证明UL 1741列名。中国证书还可能不覆盖60 Hz运行、NEMA硬件接口、热带环境假设或项目特定T&TEC和TTBS文件需求。
summary.zht: 中國常見光伏逆變器安全證據包括GB/T 37408-2021以及面向中國國內要求的CQC或CGC自願性證書。這些文件可能包含安全和標識要素，但並非IEC 62109-1/-2合規的協調證明，也不能證明UL 1741列名。中國證書還可能不覆蓋60 Hz運行、NEMA硬體介面、熱帶環境假設或項目特定T&TEC和TTBS文件需求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC/CGC voluntary certification — China domestic voluntary PV inverter certification schemes

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 37408 safety certificates alone should not be treated as sufficient for Trinidad and Tobago. Exporters should prepare: (a) IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for the exact model or family; (b) UL 1741 evidence or a clear gap statement where the project, NEMA specification, T&TEC engineer, or owner requires UL-style listing; (c) documentation that safety ratings cover 60 Hz operation and the supplied AC voltage configuration; (d) installation manuals, labels, warnings, wiring diagrams, earthing details, and environmental ratings suitable for local inspectors and project engineers; (e) confirmation of any TTBS import or conformity expectation before shipment.
gap.zh: 不得将中国GB/T 37408安全证书单独视为足以用于特立尼达和多巴哥。出口商应准备：（a）由ILAC认可实验室出具、覆盖具体型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书；（b）项目、NEMA规格、T&TEC工程师或业主要求UL式列名时，提供UL 1741证据或明确的差距说明；（c）证明安全额定值覆盖60 Hz运行和所供应交流电压配置的文件；（d）适合当地检查人员和项目工程师使用的安装手册、标签、警告、接线图、接地细节和环境额定值；（e）出货前确认任何TTBS进口或合格评定期望。
gap.zht: 不得將中國GB/T 37408安全證書單獨視為足以用於千里達及托巴哥。出口商應準備：（a）由ILAC認可實驗室出具、覆蓋具體型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書；（b）項目、NEMA規格、T&TEC工程師或業主要求UL式列名時，提供UL 1741證據或明確的差距說明；（c）證明安全額定值覆蓋60 Hz運行和所供應交流電壓配置的文件；（d）適合當地檢查人員和項目工程師使用的安裝手冊、標籤、警告、接線圖、接地細節和環境額定值；（e）出貨前確認任何TTBS進口或合格評定期望。

mandatory_status.target: IEC 62109 safety evidence is the expected baseline for PV inverter technical files; UL 1741, NEMA hardware, and additional tropical or industrial safety evidence may be mandatory where specified by T&TEC, TTBS, the project owner, insurer, or local engineer
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and CQC/CGC voluntary certificates support China domestic evidence only and are not automatic substitutes for IEC 62109 or UL 1741 evidence

source.publisher: Trinidad and Tobago Bureau of Standards (TTBS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 as the safety baseline for Trinidad and Tobago PV inverter files, and check early whether the project expects UL 1741 or NEMA-oriented evidence. Chinese GB/T 37408 certificates alone are not enough to cover 60 Hz operation, local AC service, TTBS conformity questions, or T&TEC/project-owner safety review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 特立尼达和多巴哥光伏逆变器文件应以IEC 62109-1/-2作为安全基线，并尽早确认项目是否期望UL 1741或NEMA方向证据。仅有中国GB/T 37408证书不足以覆盖60 Hz运行、当地交流供电、TTBS合格评定问题或T&TEC/项目业主安全审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 千里達及托巴哥光伏逆變器文件應以IEC 62109-1/-2作為安全基線，並儘早確認項目是否期望UL 1741或NEMA方向證據。僅有中國GB/T 37408證書不足以覆蓋60 Hz運行、當地交流供電、TTBS合格評定問題或T&TEC/項目業主安全審查。
